name: BIOMARIN PHARMACEUTICAL INC
business: BioMarin is a global rare disease biotechnology company with eight commercial therapies for genetic conditions including achondroplasia, mucopolysaccharidoses, phenylketonuria, neuronal ceroid lipofuscinosis type 2, and hemophilia A. It sells VOXZOGO, VIMIZIM, NAGLAZYME, PALYNZIQ, ALDURAZYME, BRINEURA, KUVAN, and ROCTAVIAN (being withdrawn). It also has a pipeline of product candidates for various disorders.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading, global rare disease biotechnology company focused on delivering medicines for people living with genetically defined conditions.

catalysts.event: Completion of acquisition of Inozyme Pharma
catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, we completed the acquisition of Inozyme Pharma, Inc. (Inozyme), a publicly traded clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing innovative therapeutics.

catalysts.event: Commitment to voluntarily withdraw ROCTAVIAN from the market
catalysts.sentence: Subsequently in December 2025, we committed to a plan to voluntarily withdraw ROCTAVIAN from the market due to lower than previously anticipated commercial opportunities.

catalysts.event: Issuance of $850 million senior unsecured notes due 2034
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we issued $850.0 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.5% senior unsecured notes due 2034 (the 2034 Notes), and the proceeds from the issuance were deposited into an escrow account that will be used to finance the pending acquisition of Amicus.
The transaction is expected to close in the second quarter of 2026, subject to regulatory clearances, approval by the stockholders of Amicus and other customary closing conditions.
